content.summary: Feeding a Feedback TOP through a Displace TOP creates organic, flowing motion. The displacement accumulates frame-over-frame, producing natural-looking evolving textures.
warnings: High displacement values compound quickly — start with small amounts (0.01-0.05)
Resolution mismatch between Feedback and Displace can cause UV seam artifacts

recipe.description: Connect Noise TOP as source, feed through Displace TOP using Feedback TOP output as displacement map. Feed Displace output back into Feedback.
steps: Create Noise TOP as initial source
Create Displace TOP — connect Noise to input 0
Create Feedback TOP — connect Displace output to Feedback input
Connect Feedback output to Displace input 1 (displacement map)
Set Displace weight to 0.01-0.05 to start
